stdout_tail:
usage: health_check.py [-h]

Integration health check.

options:
  -h, --help  show this help message and exit

usage: business_context.py [-h]
                           {list,upload-hr,upload-cmdb,replace,delete} ...

Use case 3: business context uploads (HR / CMDB).

positional arguments:
  {list,upload-hr,upload-cmdb,replace,delete}

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

usage: investigation_pipeline_report.py [-h]
                                        {pending-review,by-application,by-tag,sla,custom} ...

Use case 5: investigation pipeline visibility and SLA tracking.

positional arguments:
  {pending-review,by-application,by-tag,sla,custom}
    pending-review      High-severity investigations awaiting analyst review.
    by-application      Investigations created by a specific integration.
    by-tag              Investigations carrying a tag.
    sla                 Latency report from
                        createdTime/completedTime/closedTime.
    custom              Run a free-form OData filter.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

usage: mssp_multi_tenant.py [-h] [--filter-org FILTER_ORG]
                            {summary,assignable-users} ...

Use case 6: MSSP / multi-tenant operations.

positional arguments:
  {summary,assignable-users}

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --filter-org FILTER_ORG
                        OData filter applied to the org list, e.g. "role eq
                        'responder'"

usage: sdk_live_test.py [-h]

Smoke-test the SDK against the live Command Zero API.

options:
  -h, --help  show this help message and exit

usage: template_investigation.py [-h] [--list] [--template TEMPLATE]
                                 [--lead LEAD] [--title TITLE] [--tag TAGS]
                                 [--start START_TIME] [--end END_TIME]
                                 [--postback-url POSTBACK_URL]
                                 [--postback-token POSTBACK_TOKEN]

Use case 2: template-based investigation for recurring workflows.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --list                List available templates and exit.
  --template TEMPLATE   Template id or slug name (e.g. users-last-day).
  --lead LEAD           Repeatable. Format TYPE:value, e.g.
                        EMAIL_ADDRESS:user@x.com
  --title TITLE
  --tag TAGS
  --start START_TIME    ISO-8601 startTime
  --end END_TIME        ISO-8601 endTime
  --postback-url POSTBACK_URL
  --postback-token POSTBACK_TOKEN

usage: alert_investigation.py [-h] [--demo] [--alert-type ALERT_TYPE]
                              [--alert-data ALERT_DATA]
                              [--alert-schema ALERT_SCHEMA] [--title TITLE]
                              [--tag TAGS] [--postback-url POSTBACK_URL]
                              [--postback-token POSTBACK_TOKEN]

Use case 1: alert-triggered investigation from a SIEM/SOAR.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --demo                Submit the bundled email-malware example payload.
  --alert-type ALERT_TYPE
                        Built-in or custom alert type name (e.g.
                        EmailMalware).
  --alert-data ALERT_DATA
                        Path to a JSON file holding alertData. Use '-' for
                        stdin.
  --alert-schema ALERT_SCHEMA
                        Path to a JSON file holding alertSchema (list of
                        {path,type}).
  --title TITLE
  --tag TAGS
  --postback-url POSTBACK_URL
  --postback-token POSTBACK_TOKEN

usage: automated_remediation.py [-h] {contain,undo,templates} ...

Use case 4: automated remediation after investigation completes.

positional arguments:
  {contain,undo,templates}
    contain             Evaluate verdict and execute a remediation if
                        threshold met.
    undo                Reverse a previously executed remediation.
    templates           List remediation templates, optionally filtered by
                        subject type.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

usage: postback_receiver.py [-h] [--host HOST] [--port PORT]
                            [--auto-remediate]

Companion to use cases 1 and 4: receive Command Zero postbacks.

options:
  -h, --help        show this help message and exit
  --host HOST
  --port PORT
  --auto-remediate  Trigger remediation when verdict is malicious and
                    confidence high.
